nasb.text: And the nations will know that I am the Lord who sanctifies Israel, when My sanctuary is in their midst forever.” ’ ”

esv.text: Then the nations will know that I am the Lord who sanctifies Israel, when my sanctuary is in their midst forevermore.”

cnv.text: 我的聖所必永遠在他們中間，列國就知道我是耶和華，是我使以色列成聖的。’”

ccb.text: 各国的人看见我的圣所永远设立在他们当中，便会知道是我耶和华使以色列圣洁了。’”
